'''chayuru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oenophil|oenophil]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-y-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oenophil|oenophil]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chayuru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæyirith|chæyirith]] || [[word:chæyirij|chæyirij]] || [[word:chæyirish|chæyirish]] || [[word:chæyiri|chæyiri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chayuyuruth|chayuyuruth]] || [[word:chayuyuruj|chayuyuruj]] || [[word:chayuyurush|chayuyurush]] || [[word:chayuyuru|chayuyuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chayuruth|chayuruth]] || [[word:chayuruj|chayuruj]] || [[word:chayurush|chayurush]] || [[word:chayuru|chayuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chayufruth|chayufruth]] || [[word:chayufruj|chayufruj]] || [[word:chayufrush|chayufrush]] || [[word:chayufruf|chayufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chayuruthu|chayuruthu]] || [[word:chayuruju|chayuruju]] || [[word:chayurushu|chayurushu]] || [[word:chayuruku|chayuruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chayuruth|chayuruth]] || [[word:chayuruj|chayuruj]] || [[word:chayurush|chayurush]] || [[word:chayuru|chayuru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chayuruthul|chayuruthul]] || [[word:chayurujul|chayurujul]] || [[word:chayurushul|chayurushul]] || [[word:chayurukul|chayurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chayuruthuthu|chayuruthuthu]] || [[word:chayurujuju|chayurujuju]] || [[word:chayurushushu|chayurushushu]] || [[word:chayuruku|chayuruku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chayuruthun|chayuruthun]] || [[word:chayurujun|chayurujun]] || [[word:chayurushun|chayurushun]] || [[word:chayurukun|chayurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chayuruthuoro|chayuruthuoro]] || [[word:chayurujuoro|chayurujuoro]] || [[word:chayurushuoro|chayurushuoro]] || [[word:chayurukuoro|chayurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
